title: Doree
desc: Komal's fall leads to an emergency as she gives birth in Doree's house, and Kailashi arrives outraged as Komal welcomes her newborn daughter into the world.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: The entire Bharadwaj family arrives at the wedding venue to witness their plan materialise; Simar is tensed and constantly worries about Roli.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: Shaurya begins to take the 'pheras' with his bride-to-be and Sidhant rushes in to stop the wedding. Shaurya quickly lifts the veil and is shocked to see Jhanvi dressed as the bride.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: Meghna slaps Shaurya for the way he behaved and asks the Bharadwaj family for forgiveness. Simar tells her that they wish to get Jhanvi divorced from Shaurya.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: The Bharadwaj family agrees to the marriage and Jhanvi completes the 'pagphera' ritual. While the entire family waits for Jhanvi to return, Sujata tells them that she is now married to Shaurya.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: Shaurya is asked to choose between wealth and Jhanvi so he moves out of his house and begins to live at her place. Everyone including Mataji tell Shaurya to be comfortable and feel at home.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: Uma and Pari get Jhanvi's room ready for the newly married couple. Later at night, they wonder whether Shaurya has really changed or is playing a game with their family.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: Roli is shocked upon discovering Shaurya's true intentions and worries for Jhanvi. The Bharadwaj family eagerly waits as Jhanvi cooks for them.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: Pari takes some important decisions related to the shop and its design. Shaurya tells Meghna that he will make Roli repent for her mistakes.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
desc: Soumya strives to retain her individuality in a society that hates her for her identity. As she faces up to the discrimination, Soumya finds love in Harman, who becomes her biggest support in the battles to come.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
desc: Soumya strives to retain her individuality in a society that hates her for her identity. As she faces up to the discrimination, Soumya finds love in Harman, who becomes her biggest support in the battles to come.

title: Sindoor Ek Vachan
desc: A bold bride, a conflicted husband and a manipulative elder battle pride and promises, as one sacred vow becomes the key to their future.

title: Molkki
desc: Purvi decides to go to Sudha's wedding in a bid to save her while Virendra arrives, and Virendra spots Purvi in the mill and assumes that she is a thief.

title: Molkki
desc: Savita begins to worry about her daughter when she thinks about what is happening in the village, and Kanja is left smitten after spotting Purvi.

title: SUMAN INDORI
desc: Forced to marry a rich, shrewd politician, kind-hearted Suman adjusts to her new reality whilst dealing with a sister-in-law who harbours ambitions of being the head of the household.

title: Parineetii
desc: Two best friends who support each other through thick and thin face a problem when circumstance causes both of them to get married to the same man.

title: Bindiya Chamkegi
desc: Shalu agrees to marry after her brother Shyam weds Bindiya, but shocking truths emerge: fake marriages, broken alliances, and a friend hiding a vendetta.

title: Bindiya Chamkegi
desc: Shalu agrees to marry after her brother Shyam weds Bindiya, but shocking truths emerge: fake marriages, broken alliances, and a friend hiding a vendetta.

desc: Two best friends who support each other through thick and thin face a problem when circumstance causes both of them to get married to the same man.

desc: Forced to marry a rich, shrewd politician, kind-hearted Suman adjusts to her new reality whilst dealing with a sister-in-law who harbours ambitions of being the head of the household.

desc: Soumya strives to retain her individuality in a society that hates her for her identity. As she faces up to the discrimination, Soumya finds love in Harman, who becomes her biggest support in the battles to come.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
desc: Soumya strives to retain her individuality in a society that hates her for her identity. As she faces up to the discrimination, Soumya finds love in Harman, who becomes her biggest support in the battles to come.

title: Divya Sanskaar
desc: A religious leader delivers insightful discourses on the sacred scriptures, helping devotees understand the path to spirituality and the true essence of life.

title: Divya Sanskaar
desc: Pujya Rajan Ji details Shabri Maiya's extended wait and encounter with Lord Ram. Subsequently, he outlines her dedication and the nine variations of Bhakti.

title: Jai Jagannath
desc: The king, seeking revenge for his severed nose, threatens to conquer Biswabasu's village. However, the marriage between Lalita and the prince could prevent a violent conflict.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Adventure Bay suddenly gets a huge problem in the form of a giant, and then, Cap'n Turbot's French cousin gets stuck on a cliff.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Marshall gets a new best friend when a gosling takes a liking to him, and then Ryder and the PAW Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save the major.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Jake and Everest are excited about the Snowboard Competition, until they see the course is buried under a blanket of snow. PAW Patrol sets out to retrieve Cap'n Turbot's sunken diving bell.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: When a ghost appears at the Lookout, the Pups and Chase have a stakeout; the Pups put on a Medieval play in the town square.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois get rescued. Chompy the Beaver takes a liking to the wood at Farmer Yumi's Farm.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Rubble finds an old, brass jack-in-the-box with a genie inside who grants him three wishes. Francois Turbot prepares to walk a tightrope between the top of the bridge and the lookout tower.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Marshall wins a race and as a prize gets a shiny new collar. Convinced that it is lucky, he takes more risks than he would normally dare to when the pups are called to rescue young owl, Little Hootie, from a breaking high branch.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Yumi's Yummy Honey is all the buzz until it, and her beehive, go missing from her farm. Mayor Goodway's purse has disappeared, along with its precious cargo, Chickaletta.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch. When a robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay, Ryder knows who to call to save the far-flung flying disc.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: What's that smell? A strange odour is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes. Olivia the Ostrich has fallen in to the canyon! The pups need to work together to lift her to safety, while keeping her soon-to-hatch eggs warm.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: Giant balloons have floated away from a parade in 'Pups Save the Balloon Pups', then in' Pups Save the Spider Spies', the Turbo cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle in 'Pups Save Bedtime', then in 'Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg', Chickaletta has laid an egg, but it rolls away and is heading through town.

title: Khatra Khatra Khatra
desc: Harsh, Bharti Singh and Aditya's younger versions make an appearance. Later, Reem Sheikh and Shraddha Arya play a twisted game of basketball.

title: Doree
desc: Doree confronts Kailashi Devi when she arrives to invite Ganga Ram to a religious meeting, and she eventually sets a strange precondition to permit Ganga Ram's presence at the mansion.

title: Doree
desc: Kailash Devi vows to avenge the humiliation meted out against her at Ganga Ram's house, and Mansi is shocked to learn that her daughter is alive.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: After Simar and Roli marry into the Bharadwaj family and prove to be the perfect daughters-in-law, Simar Bhardwaj is entrusted with finding an ideal wife for Gitanjali Devi's grandson.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: As Simar enjoys time with Anjali and Pari's baby, Pari's mother entrusts Anjali's care to Simar. The family then comes together in high spirits for the baby's naming ceremony.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: Jhanvi excuses herself from the naming event after a hospital call and accidentally runs into Shaurya.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: Shaurya convinces Jhanvi to have dinner with him, and they spend a good time with each other, while Pari's mother accuses Simar of coming between Aarav and Pari.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: When Pari's mother scolds Simar, the entire family supports the latter; Jhanvi tells Shaurya that the Bharadwajs are planning to get her married elsewhere.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: As Jhanvi gets ready to meet her prospective groom, Shaurya sneaks into her room. when Simar and Shaurya come face-to-face, the former gets angry.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: When Jhanvi finds Shaurya's note for her, she gets worried and rushes to look for him. Roli tells Simar that Jhanvi might be in trouble.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
desc: When Jhanvi goes to Shaurya's house, he tells her that she is in love with him. Roli gets worried when Jhanvi does not return home in time.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
desc: Preeto threatens to kill Kareena to release Surbhi as soon as possible. Kareena insists that she will free Surbhi only in exchange for Soumya.

title: Sindoor Ek Vachan
desc: Shantanu, a man of conviction who lives life according to his own principles, crosses paths with Poorna, who alters both his way of life and his worldview.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
desc: Preeto threatens to kill Kareena to release Surbhi as soon as possible. Kareena insists that she will free Surbhi only in exchange for Soumya.

title: Suman Indori
desc: Teerth challenges Suman to a wrestling match and presents her with an ultimatum to reveal the identity of Rishi's father if she loses.

title: Parineetii
desc: Parineet is shocked when she sees Rajeev at the venue wearing the uniform of the orchestra team. Later, Rajeev informs Parineet that he is at the venue to find Mishka.

desc: Movie to be announced.
